name: Trionex
message: Trionex Achats specializes in the manufacturing and repair of hydraulic and pneumatic cylinders, as well as providing hydraulic services and engineering solutions. Their product offerings includea wide range of hydraulic components, pumps, filtration systems,and pneumatic equipment, catering to various industries such as mining, forestry, and industrial sectors.We will upload corporate data soon. Personal files of employees (passport and DLs, SSNs and so on), financials, project documentation, contracts and agreements, NDAs, clients contacts and so on.
